subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath vouchsafed unto all created things the sacred breezes from the divine and spiritual Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که نسایم قدسی از رضوان قدس معنوی بر جمیع ممکنات مبذول فرموده تا
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @outward and inward meanings
